//program

using IntegriteCBPFx.App;
using IntegriteCBPFx.App.Features.Verification;
using IntegriteCBPFx.SharedKernel.Abstractions;
using IntegriteCBPFx.SharedKernel.Time;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
using NLog;
using NLog.Extensions.Logging;

// Charge la config NLog tôt : capte aussi les erreurs survenant AVANT le host.
var logger = LogManager.Setup().LoadConfigurationFromFile("nlog.config").GetCurrentClassLogger();

try
{
    var builder = Host.CreateApplicationBuilder(args);

    // Journalisation : NLog comme unique fournisseur (config = nlog.config).
    builder.Logging.ClearProviders();
    builder.Logging.AddNLog();

    // Services transverses + slice(s).
    builder.Services.AddSingleton<IClock, SystemClock>();
    builder.Services.AddVerificationFeature(builder.Configuration);
    // NB : le DbContext de persistance n'est pas encore enregistré (adapter Store
    // = stub). Le dev Persistance ajoutera ici AddDbContext + EfVerificationStore.

    using var host = builder.Build();

    DateOnly businessDate;
    try
    {
        businessDate = VerificationArgs.ResolveBusinessDate(args, host.Services.GetRequiredService<IClock>());
    }
    catch (FormatException ex)
    {
        logger.Error(ex, "Arguments de ligne de commande invalides.");
        return ExitCodes.InvalidArguments;
    }

    // Annulation propre sur Ctrl+C / arrêt Control-M.
    using var cts = new CancellationTokenSource();
    Console.CancelKeyPress += (_, eventArgs) =>
    {
        eventArgs.Cancel = true;
        cts.Cancel();
    };

    using var scope = host.Services.CreateScope();
    var handler = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<RunVerificationHandler>();

    var result = await handler.HandleAsync(new RunVerificationCommand(businessDate), cts.Token);

    return ExitCodes.FromResult(result);
}
catch (Exception ex)
{
    logger.Fatal(ex, "Échec inattendu de la vérification.");
    return ExitCodes.UnexpectedError;
}
finally
{
    // Vide les buffers des targets NLog (important pour un batch court).
    LogManager.Shutdown();
}


//end program

//VerificationArgs
using System.Globalization;
using IntegriteCBPFx.SharedKernel.Abstractions;

namespace IntegriteCBPFx.App;

/// <summary>
/// Analyse des arguments de ligne de commande passés par Control-M.
/// </summary>
/// <remarks>
/// Usage :
///   IntegriteCBPFx                       -> date métier = J-1 (jour ouvré précédent simplifié)
///   IntegriteCBPFx 2026-06-11            -> date métier explicite (ISO)
///   IntegriteCBPFx --date 2026-06-11     -> idem
///   IntegriteCBPFx --date=2026-06-11     -> idem
/// </remarks>
public static class VerificationArgs
{
    /// <summary>Résout la date métier à traiter à partir des arguments (défaut : J-1).</summary>
    /// <exception cref="FormatException">Si une date est fournie mais non parseable (format ISO attendu).</exception>
    public static DateOnly ResolveBusinessDate(string[] args, IClock clock)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(args);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(clock);

        var raw = ExtractDateToken(args);
        if (raw is null)
        {
            // Défaut : veille du jour courant. ⚠️ Calendrier des jours ouvrés à
            // affiner avec le métier (jours fériés, week-ends) si nécessaire.
            return DateOnly.FromDateTime(clock.Current.Date).AddDays(-1);
        }

        if (!DateOnly.TryParse(raw, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, DateTimeStyles.None, out var businessDate))
        {
            throw new FormatException($"Date métier invalide : « {raw} ». Format attendu : yyyy-MM-dd.");
        }

        return businessDate;
    }

    private static string? ExtractDateToken(string[] args)
    {
        for (var i = 0; i < args.Length; i++)
        {
            var arg = args[i];
            if (arg.StartsWith("--date=", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                return arg["--date=".Length..];
            }

            if (arg.Equals("--date", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) && i + 1 < args.Length)
            {
                return args[i + 1];
            }

            if (!arg.StartsWith('-'))
            {
                return arg; // argument positionnel
            }
        }

        return null;
    }
}

//end VerificationArgs


//exit codes
using IntegriteCBPFx.App.Features.Verification;

namespace IntegriteCBPFx.App;

/// <summary>
/// Codes de sortie du processus, interprétés par Control-M.
/// Convention : 0 = OK (le job a tourné), &gt; 0 = échec technique du job.
/// </summary>
/// <remarks>
/// La présence d'anomalies N'EST PAS un échec : le run a réussi, les anomalies
/// sont des données métier (le Back-Office est alerté via la notification).
/// Si Control-M doit brancher spécifiquement sur « anomalies détectées », ajouter
/// ici un code dédié (p. ex. 10) et l'utiliser dans <see cref="FromResult"/>.
/// </remarks>
public static class ExitCodes
{
    /// <summary>Run terminé avec succès (avec ou sans anomalies).</summary>
    public const int Success = 0;

    /// <summary>Erreur inattendue (exception non gérée).</summary>
    public const int UnexpectedError = 1;

    /// <summary>Run en échec fonctionnel (p. ex. source indisponible / « API down »).</summary>
    public const int VerificationFailed = 2;

    /// <summary>Arguments de ligne de commande invalides.</summary>
    public const int InvalidArguments = 3;

    public static int FromResult(RunVerificationResult result)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(result);
        return result.Succeeded ? Success : VerificationFailed;
    }
}

//end exit codes

//settings
{
  "ConnectionStrings": {
    "//": "Base de persistance des anomalies (tables créées par les DBA).",
    "Integrite": "Server=localhost;Database=IntegriteCBPFx;Trusted_Connection=True;TrustServerCertificate=True"
  },
  "Cbp": {
    "//": "Valeurs PLACEHOLDER pour faire tourner le squelette. À renseigner par environnement.",
    "BaseUrl": "http://localhost:5080",
    "TransactionsPath": "/api/transactions",
    "Status": [ "ALL" ],
    "TimeoutSeconds": 100
  },
  "FxSentry": {
    "ConnectionString": "Server=localhost;Database=FxSentry;Trusted_Connection=True;TrustServerCertificate=True",
    "ViewName": "dbo.vw_FxSentryTransactions"
  }
}

//end settings

//verification module
using IntegriteCBPFx.SharedKernel.Comparison;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Options;

namespace IntegriteCBPFx.App.Features.Verification;

/// <summary>
/// Câblage DI de la slice Verification. Point d'entrée unique : le host appelle
/// <c>AddVerificationFeature(configuration)</c> et toute la slice est enregistrée.
/// </summary>
public static class VerificationModule
{
    public static IServiceCollection AddVerificationFeature(this IServiceCollection services, IConfiguration configuration)
    {
        // --- Options validées ---
        services.AddOptions<CbpApiOptions>()
            .Bind(configuration.GetSection(CbpApiOptions.SectionName))
            .ValidateDataAnnotations();

        services.AddOptions<FxSentryOptions>()
            .Bind(configuration.GetSection(FxSentryOptions.SectionName))
            .ValidateDataAnnotations();

        // --- Règles de domaine (SharedKernel) — implémentations par défaut du MVP ---
        services.AddSingleton<ITransactionComparer, CriticalFieldComparer>();
        services.AddSingleton<IJustificationPolicy, NoJustificationPolicy>();

        // --- Adapters de la slice (stubs walking-skeleton à remplacer) ---
        // CBP : HttpClient typé, configuré depuis les options.
        services.AddHttpClient<ICbpTransactionSource, CbpTransactionSource>((sp, client) =>
        {
            var options = sp.GetRequiredService<IOptions<CbpApiOptions>>().Value;
            if (options.BaseUrl is not null)
            {
                client.BaseAddress = options.BaseUrl;
            }

            client.Timeout = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(options.TimeoutSeconds);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(options.ApiKey))
            {
                client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-Api-Key", options.ApiKey);
            }
        });
        // TODO(dev CBP) : ajouter la résilience -> .AddStandardResilienceHandler();

        services.AddScoped<IFxSentryTransactionSource, FxSentryTransactionSource>();
        services.AddScoped<IVerificationStore, VerificationStore>();
        services.AddSingleton<IBackOfficeNotifier, BackOfficeNotifier>();

        // --- Use-case ---
        services.AddScoped<RunVerificationHandler>();

        return services;
    }
}

//end verification module


// RunVerificationResult
using IntegriteCBPFx.SharedKernel.Abstractions;
using IntegriteCBPFx.SharedKernel.Anomalies;
using IntegriteCBPFx.SharedKernel.Comparison;
using IntegriteCBPFx.SharedKernel.Transactions;
using IntegriteCBPFx.SharedKernel.Verification;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;

namespace IntegriteCBPFx.App.Features.Verification;

/// <summary>Commande : lancer la vérification d'intégrité pour une date métier.</summary>
public sealed record RunVerificationCommand(DateOnly BusinessDate);

/// <summary>Résultat synthétique du run, utilisé par le host pour le code de sortie.</summary>
public sealed record RunVerificationResult
{
    public required Guid RunId { get; init; }
    public required VerificationStatus Status { get; init; }
    public int CbpTransactionCount { get; init; }
    public int FxTransactionCount { get; init; }
    public int AnomalyCount { get; init; }
    public string? FailureReason { get; init; }

    public bool Succeeded => Status == VerificationStatus.Completed;
    public bool HasAnomalies => AnomalyCount > 0;

    public static RunVerificationResult FromRun(VerificationRun run) => new()
    {
        RunId = run.Id,
        Status = run.Status,
        CbpTransactionCount = run.CbpTransactionCount,
        FxTransactionCount = run.FxTransactionCount,
        AnomalyCount = run.AnomalyCount,
        FailureReason = run.FailureReason,
    };
}

/// <summary>
/// Use-case central de la slice : transcrit le diagramme de processus MVP.
///   1. Extraire CBP (A) puis FXSentry (B) — échec si une source est indisponible.
///   2. Pour chaque Tx de A : absente de B => anomalie ; sinon comparer les champs
///      critiques ; écart non justifiable => anomalie.
///   3. Pour chaque Tx de B non traitée => anomalie.
///   4. Persister run + anomalies.
///   5. Au moins une anomalie => notifier le Back-Office.
///
///  La logique d'ORCHESTRATION (le flux ci-dessous) est volontairement complète :
/// c'est le squelette stable autour duquel les devs branchent leurs adapters.
/// Les VRAIES données viennent des adapters (CBP/FX/Store/Notifier), encore stubs.
/// </summary>
public sealed class RunVerificationHandler(
    ICbpTransactionSource cbpSource,
    IFxSentryTransactionSource fxSource,
    ITransactionComparer comparer,
    IJustificationPolicy justificationPolicy,
    IVerificationStore store,
    IBackOfficeNotifier notifier,
    IClock clock,
    ILogger<RunVerificationHandler> logger)
{
    public async Task<RunVerificationResult> HandleAsync(RunVerificationCommand command, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(command);

        var run = VerificationRun.Start(Guid.NewGuid(), command.BusinessDate, clock.Current);
        using var scope = logger.BeginScope("Run {RunId} - {BusinessDate}", run.Id, command.BusinessDate);
        logger.LogInformation("Démarrage de la vérification.");

        // --- Étape 1 : extraction des deux sources (gestion « API down ») ---
        IReadOnlyCollection<AppTransaction> cbpTransactions;
        IReadOnlyCollection<AppTransaction> fxTransactions;
        try
        {
            cbpTransactions = await ExtractCbpTransactionsAsync(command.BusinessDate, cancellationToken);
            fxTransactions = await ExtractFxSentryTransactionsAsync(command.BusinessDate, cancellationToken);
        }
        catch (TransactionSourceUnavailableException ex)
        {
            return await FailRunAsync(run, ex, cancellationToken);
        }

        logger.LogInformation(
            "Extraction OK : {CbpCount} transactions CBP, {FxCount} transactions FXSentry.",
            cbpTransactions.Count, fxTransactions.Count);

        // --- Étapes 2 & 3 : vérification ---
        var anomalies = Verify(run.Id, cbpTransactions, fxTransactions);

        // --- Étape 4 : persistance ---
        await store.AddAnomaliesAsync(anomalies, cancellationToken);
        run.Complete(clock.Current, cbpTransactions.Count, fxTransactions.Count, anomalies.Count);
        await store.SaveRunAsync(run, cancellationToken);

        logger.LogInformation("Vérification terminée : {AnomalyCount} anomalie(s).", anomalies.Count);

        // --- Étape 5 : notification si au moins une anomalie ---
        if (anomalies.Count > 0)
        {
            await notifier.NotifyAsync(run, cancellationToken);
        }

        return RunVerificationResult.FromRun(run);
    }

    /// <summary>Extraction des transactions CBP (ResultSet A).</summary>
    private async Task<IReadOnlyCollection<AppTransaction>> ExtractCbpTransactionsAsync(DateOnly businessDate, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        var transactions = await cbpSource.GetTransactionsAsync(businessDate, cancellationToken);
        logger.LogDebug("CBP : {Count} transaction(s) extraite(s).", transactions.Count);
        return transactions;
    }

    /// <summary>Extraction des transactions FXSentry (ResultSet B).</summary>
    private async Task<IReadOnlyCollection<AppTransaction>> ExtractFxSentryTransactionsAsync(DateOnly businessDate, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        var transactions = await fxSource.GetTransactionsAsync(businessDate, cancellationToken);
        logger.LogDebug("FXSentry : {Count} transaction(s) extraite(s).", transactions.Count);
        return transactions;
    }

    /// <summary>Clôture le run en échec (source indisponible) et le persiste.</summary>
    private async Task<RunVerificationResult> FailRunAsync(VerificationRun run, TransactionSourceUnavailableException ex, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        logger.LogError(ex, "Source {Source} indisponible. Run interrompu.", ex.FailedSource);
        run.Fail(clock.Current, $"Source {ex.FailedSource} indisponible : {ex.Message}");
        await store.SaveRunAsync(run, cancellationToken);
        return RunVerificationResult.FromRun(run);
    }

    private List<Anomaly> Verify(
        Guid runId,
        IReadOnlyCollection<AppTransaction> cbpTransactions,
        IReadOnlyCollection<AppTransaction> fxTransactions)
    {
        var now = clock.Current;
        var anomalies = new List<Anomaly>();

        // Index des transactions FX par clé métier pour une vérification O(n).
        // NB : clé supposée unique côté FX ; les doublons sont signalés
        // (règle de gestion à confirmer avec le métier).
        var fxByKey = new Dictionary<string, AppTransaction>(StringComparer.Ordinal);
        foreach (var fx in fxTransactions)
        {
            if (!fxByKey.TryAdd(fx.TransactionId, fx))
            {
                logger.LogWarning("Clé FXSentry en doublon ignorée : {TransactionId}.", fx.TransactionId);
            }
        }

        var matchedFxKeys = new HashSet<string>(StringComparer.Ordinal);

        // Pour chaque transaction de A (CBP).
        foreach (var cbp in cbpTransactions)
        {
            if (!fxByKey.TryGetValue(cbp.TransactionId, out var fx))
            {
                anomalies.Add(Anomaly.CbpNotPresentInFx(runId, cbp, now));
                continue;
            }

            matchedFxKeys.Add(cbp.TransactionId);

            var comparison = comparer.Compare(cbp, fx);
            if (comparison.HasDifferences && !justificationPolicy.IsJustifiable(cbp, fx, comparison.Differences))
            {
                anomalies.Add(Anomaly.CbpFxDifferent(runId, cbp, fx, comparison.Differences, now));
            }
        }

        // Pour chaque transaction de B non encore traitée.
        foreach (var fx in fxTransactions)
        {
            if (!matchedFxKeys.Contains(fx.TransactionId))
            {
                anomalies.Add(Anomaly.FxNotPresentInCbp(runId, fx, now));
            }
        }

        return anomalies;
    }
}

// end RunVerificationResult

//RunVerificationHandlerTests
using IntegriteCBPFx.App.Features.Verification;
using IntegriteCBPFx.SharedKernel.Anomalies;
using IntegriteCBPFx.SharedKernel.Comparison;
using IntegriteCBPFx.SharedKernel.Verification;
using IntegriteCBPFx.SharedKernel.Transactions;
using IntegriteCBPFx.Tests.TestSupport;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions;
using NSubstitute;
using Xunit;

namespace IntegriteCBPFx.Tests.Features.Verification;

public sealed class RunVerificationHandlerTests
{
    private readonly ICbpTransactionSource _cbpSource = Substitute.For<ICbpTransactionSource>();
    private readonly IFxSentryTransactionSource _fxSource = Substitute.For<IFxSentryTransactionSource>();
    private readonly IVerificationStore _store = Substitute.For<IVerificationStore>();
    private readonly IBackOfficeNotifier _notifier = Substitute.For<IBackOfficeNotifier>();

    private RunVerificationHandler CreateHandler() => new(
        _cbpSource,
        _fxSource,
        new CriticalFieldComparer(),
        new NoJustificationPolicy(),
        _store,
        _notifier,
        new FixedClock(new DateTimeOffset(2026, 6, 12, 8, 0, 0, TimeSpan.Zero)),
        NullLogger<RunVerificationHandler>.Instance);

    private void GivenSources(IReadOnlyCollection<AppTransaction> cbp, IReadOnlyCollection<AppTransaction> fx)
    {
        _cbpSource.GetTransactionsAsync(Arg.Any<DateOnly>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>()).Returns(cbp);
        _fxSource.GetTransactionsAsync(Arg.Any<DateOnly>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>()).Returns(fx);
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task When_CbpTransaction_Missing_In_Fx_Then_AnomalyCbpNotPresentInFx()
    {
        GivenSources([TransactionBuilder.Cbp("T1")], []);

        var result = await CreateHandler().HandleAsync(new RunVerificationCommand(TransactionBuilder.DefaultDate), CancellationToken.None);

        Assert.Equal(VerificationStatus.Completed, result.Status);
        Assert.Equal(1, result.AnomalyCount);
        await _store.Received(1).AddAnomaliesAsync(
            Arg.Is<IReadOnlyCollection<Anomaly>>(a => a.Count == 1 && a.First().Reason == AnomalyReason.CbpNotPresentInFx),
            Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
        await _notifier.Received(1).NotifyAsync(Arg.Any<VerificationRun>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task When_FxTransaction_Missing_In_Cbp_Then_AnomalyFxNotPresentInCbp()
    {
        GivenSources([], [TransactionBuilder.Fx("T1")]);

        var result = await CreateHandler().HandleAsync(new RunVerificationCommand(TransactionBuilder.DefaultDate), CancellationToken.None);

        Assert.Equal(1, result.AnomalyCount);
        await _store.Received(1).AddAnomaliesAsync(
            Arg.Is<IReadOnlyCollection<Anomaly>>(a => a.Single().Reason == AnomalyReason.FxNotPresentInCbp),
            Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task When_CriticalField_Differs_Then_AnomalyCbpFxDifferent()
    {
        GivenSources([TransactionBuilder.Cbp("T1", amount: 100m)], [TransactionBuilder.Fx("T1", amount: 999m)]);

        var result = await CreateHandler().HandleAsync(new RunVerificationCommand(TransactionBuilder.DefaultDate), CancellationToken.None);

        Assert.Equal(1, result.AnomalyCount);
        await _store.Received(1).AddAnomaliesAsync(
            Arg.Is<IReadOnlyCollection<Anomaly>>(a => a.Single().Reason == AnomalyReason.CbpFxDifferent),
            Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task When_Transactions_Match_Then_NoAnomaly_And_NoNotification()
    {
        GivenSources([TransactionBuilder.Cbp("T1")], [TransactionBuilder.Fx("T1")]);

        var result = await CreateHandler().HandleAsync(new RunVerificationCommand(TransactionBuilder.DefaultDate), CancellationToken.None);

        Assert.Equal(0, result.AnomalyCount);
        await _notifier.DidNotReceive().NotifyAsync(Arg.Any<VerificationRun>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task When_Source_Unavailable_Then_RunFails_And_NothingPersisted()
    {
        _cbpSource.GetTransactionsAsync(Arg.Any<DateOnly>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>())
            .Returns<IReadOnlyCollection<AppTransaction>>(_ => throw new TransactionSourceUnavailableException(TransactionSource.Cbp, "API down"));

        var result = await CreateHandler().HandleAsync(new RunVerificationCommand(TransactionBuilder.DefaultDate), CancellationToken.None);

        Assert.Equal(VerificationStatus.Failed, result.Status);
        await _store.DidNotReceive().AddAnomaliesAsync(Arg.Any<IReadOnlyCollection<Anomaly>>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
        await _notifier.DidNotReceive().NotifyAsync(Arg.Any<VerificationRun>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
        await _store.Received(1).SaveRunAsync(Arg.Is<VerificationRun>(r => r.Status == VerificationStatus.Failed), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
    }
}

//end RunVerificationHandlerTests


//CriticalFieldComparerTests
using IntegriteCBPFx.SharedKernel.Comparison;
using IntegriteCBPFx.Tests.TestSupport;
using Xunit;

namespace IntegriteCBPFx.Tests.SharedKernel;

public sealed class CriticalFieldComparerTests
{
    private readonly CriticalFieldComparer _comparer = new();

    [Fact]
    public void Compare_WhenAllCriticalFieldsMatch_ReturnsNoDifference()
    {
        var cbp = TransactionBuilder.Cbp("T1");
        var fx = TransactionBuilder.Fx("T1");

        var result = _comparer.Compare(cbp, fx);

        Assert.False(result.HasDifferences);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void Compare_WhenAmountDiffers_ReportsAmountDifference()
    {
        var cbp = TransactionBuilder.Cbp("T1", amount: 100m);
        var fx = TransactionBuilder.Fx("T1", amount: 101m);

        var result = _comparer.Compare(cbp, fx);

        Assert.True(result.HasDifferences);
        Assert.Contains(result.Differences, d => d.FieldName == "Amount");
    }

    [Fact]
    public void Compare_WhenCurrencyDiffers_ReportsCurrencyDifference()
    {
        var cbp = TransactionBuilder.Cbp("T1", currency: "EUR");
        var fx = TransactionBuilder.Fx("T1", currency: "USD");

        var result = _comparer.Compare(cbp, fx);

        Assert.Contains(result.Differences, d => d.FieldName == "Currency" && d.CbpValue == "EUR" && d.FxValue == "USD");
    }
}

//end CriticalFieldComparerTests

// FixedClock
using IntegriteCBPFx.SharedKernel.Abstractions;

namespace IntegriteCBPFx.Tests.TestSupport;

/// <summary>Horloge figée pour des tests déterministes.</summary>
public sealed class FixedClock(DateTimeOffset now) : IClock
{
    public DateTimeOffset Current { get; } = now;
}

//end FixedClock

// TransactionBuilder
using IntegriteCBPFx.SharedKernel.Transactions;

namespace IntegriteCBPFx.Tests.TestSupport;

/// <summary>Petit builder pour fabriquer des transactions de test lisibles.</summary>
public static class TransactionBuilder
{
    public static readonly DateOnly DefaultDate = new(2026, 6, 11);

    public static AppTransaction Cbp(
        string id,
        decimal amount = 100m,
        string currency = "EUR",
        string? direction = "BUY",
        string? counterpartyId = "CP1",
        DateOnly? valueDate = null) => new()
        {
            TransactionId = id,
            Source = TransactionSource.Cbp,
            ValueDate = valueDate ?? DefaultDate,
            Currency = currency,
            Amount = amount,
            Direction = direction,
            CounterpartyId = counterpartyId,
        };

    public static AppTransaction Fx(
        string id,
        decimal amount = 100m,
        string currency = "EUR",
        string? direction = "BUY",
        string? counterpartyId = "CP1",
        DateOnly? valueDate = null) => new()
        {
            TransactionId = id,
            Source = TransactionSource.FxSentry,
            ValueDate = valueDate ?? DefaultDate,
            Currency = currency,
            Amount = amount,
            Direction = direction,
            CounterpartyId = counterpartyId,
        };
}

// end TransactionBuilder
